body:
60 votes. That's the threshold President Obama's nominees cleared before they were appointed to the Supreme Court. Chuck Schumer is making it clear that Donald Trump's nominees will have to clear the same bar.

Friend --

**Senator Chuck Schumer has announced that he will filibuster Donald Trump 's Supreme Court nominee.**

When President Obama's nominees to the Court came up for a vote, each was able earn more than 60 votes in support. By leading this filibuster, the Democratic leader in the Senate is demanding that Neil Gorsuch meet the same threshold.

**[Will you add your name to say you're standing with Senator Schumer in this fight?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2c9/2b07114c/5924b80a/736b62b6/2263819700/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-60-votes?source=PT-20170327-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

More than ever, we need to show Senate Democrats we have their back.

Thank You,
Team DSCC

P.S. Once you've added your name, tell us -- what's your reason for opposing Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee? His ruling to deny women birth control in Hobby Lobby? The time he sided with a company who fired a truck driver for not freezing to death with his cargo? Or the time he ruled it was ok to fire a worker for taking time to recover from cancer? **[Let us know> >](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2c9/2b07114c/5924b80a/736b62b6/2263819700/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-60-votes?source=PT-20170327-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

**A quick note on contributions, friend:**

Donald Trump and the GOP have announced six-figure ad buys against Democratic Senators who are standing up to his Supreme Court nominee. With 99% of our donations coming from grassroots democrats giving $200 or less, we really mean it when we say we're counting on your support.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today. We need your help in this fight.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: President Trump knocked it out of the park with Judge Gorsuch
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
LindseyGraham.com

I want to bring you the latest updates from the front lines where
I sit on the Judiciary Committee.

Dear Friend,

Last week the Senate Judiciary Committee considered Judge Neil
Gorsuch's nomination for the Supreme Court. As a member of the
committee, I look forward to leading the charge for his
confirmation on the Senate floor. In the meantime, I wanted to
give you an update from the front lines.

First and foremost, President Trump knocked it out of the park
with his selection of Judge Gorsuch. The President could not have
chosen a more qualified conservative to serve on the Supreme
Court. Well done Mr. President!

The people who know Judge Gorsuch vouch that he is a fine man and
respected judge. He has issued nearly 2,700 opinions and was
overruled in only one case. That's an incredible record! He also
received the highest rating of "well qualified" from the American
Bar Association. I have challenged the Democrats repeatedly to
demonstrate how Judge Gorsuch is not qualified to serve on the
Supreme Court. Their silence is deafening.

Judge Gorsuch endured a week of withering criticism from liberals
on the Judiciary Committee, but he was formidable. The Democrats
were unable to land a political blow on him.

House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi made the ridiculous statement
that Judge Gorsuch was a bad choice "if you breathe air, drink
water, eat food, take medicine or in any other way interact with
the court." Senator Elizabeth Warren said, "Let's not mince
words, the nomination of Gorsuch is a huge gift to wealthy
individuals and corporations that stole the Supreme Court seat in
order to make sure that the justice system works for them."

As I said during the hearing last week, these attacks on Judge
Gorsuch are political garbage. Unfortunately, I have not heard
one liberal rebuke those comments or condemn them for being out
of bounds. It's a shame because our country deserves better.

Sensing the growing momentum behind Judge Gorsuch's nomination,
Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer has now indicated he'll
filibuster and require 60 votes to move forward. If Senator
Schumer goes down this dangerous path, I will do whatever it
takes to confirm Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. If that means
changing the rules in the Senate, so be it.

I will not allow the Democrats to obstruct and defeat the
nomination of an exceptionally qualified candidate like Judge
Gorsuch just because they don't like the outcome of the election.
Elections have consequences, and President Trump should get the
right to nominate a conservative justice.

As Judge Gorsuch's confirmation process moves forward, I will
continue to keep you updated.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham
United States Senator

P.S. On Saturday, I held a town hall meeting in Columbia with
approximately 700 attendees, an overwhelming majority of whom
were liberal Democrats. They were upset at many of the
conservative positions I took, but they were especially angry
when I defended Judge Gorsuch as an exceptional choice by
President Trump and urged the Democrats not to filibuster his
nomination. If you'd like to read more about the lively town hall
or watch the video, click here: Graham Spars With Raucous Town
Hall Over Support Of Trump's SCOTUS Pick.

Paid For By Team Graham, Inc.

Everything White House for 3/28/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
Today marks the start of a new era in American energy production and job creation. President Donald J. Trump’s Energy Independence Executive Order takes historic steps to lift the restrictions on American energy, reverse government intrusion, and cancel job-killing regulations. The EO will allow the EPA to focus on its primary mission of protecting our air and water.

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Friday
body:
Let's close March strong.
---
**Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is on Friday, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $10 or more right now.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca05/4067b0a/2e4fb1334/7e71beeb/3044900906/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170328_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170328_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170328_tp_v2s1")**
Hi --

I wanted to take a quick moment to talk about something pretty big that's coming up: **[the quarterly fundraising deadline on Friday.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca05/4067b0a/2e4fb1334/7e71bee9/3044900906/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+the+quarterly+fundraising+deadline+on+Fr&utm_campaign=em_20170328_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170328_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170328_tp_v2s1")**

Whatever we have in the bank at the end of the day on Friday will go on our official report to the FEC. It's a public document, so anyone can see it -- and use it as a measure of our party's grassroots strength.

So we need to make a splash, put up a big number at the end of these next four days, and kick our efforts to mobilize and energize Democrats around the country into high gear.

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Gain a biblical perspective on today’s big debates!
body:
Finding a proper perspective on the big debates
View this email in your browser

My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE
A Conversation with J.D. Greear
Dacus
Date: MAR 30TH
Time: 8:30PM (ET) / 5:30PM (PT)

Dear Peter,

How you look at the world
matters. It affects what you believe and what you do. But how do
we gain the proper perspective, not so we can win an argument in
the debates of our time, but so we can faithfully display the
glory of God in the world around us?

Join us with author and pastor
J.D. Greear for our next My Faith Matters LIVE show as we explore
how to gain a biblical perspective on today's big debates.

J.D. Greear is the pastor of The
Summit Church, in Raleigh-Durham, NC and author of Gaining by
Losing: Why the Future Belongs to Churches That Send (2015) and
Stop Asking Jesus into Your Heart: How to Know for Sure You Are
Saved (2013). J.D. describes the joy, reckless generosity, and
audacious faith that come from having a right worldview and
knowing God's extravagant love found in Christ.

Be encouraged and join the
conversation on Thursday, March 30th at 8:30PM ET / 5:30PM PT.

My Faith Matters LIVE shows are
streamed live over the Internet at MyFaithVotes.org, or if you
are on the move, sign up for our interactive call and listen on
your phone.

subject: Obamacare safe (FOR NOW)

body:
---
Derek,

The Republican leadership in the House of Representatives announced on Friday that they wouldn't vote on their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

All of last week the media focused on whether the far-right Freedom Caucus would support the bill -- but ultimately it wasn't just the hardliners who came out against their plan to take health insurance away from 24 million Americans. It was moderates, it was progressives, and it was all of you.

**Derek, this is what success looks like under a Trump presidency. And it could only happen because of you.** The women's marches. The countless calls to Congressional offices. Your unrelenting presence at rallies and Congressional town hall meetings -- and the outpouring of financial support to folks like Tim Kaine who are holding the President's feet to the fire and fighting tooth and nail against his agenda.

You're demonstrating that if Republican leaders continue to push a hard right-wing ideological agenda instead of working constructively to fix the pressing problems that our country is actually facing, they're going to be in for a rude awakening at the ballot box. And members of Congress are taking notice.

**We need to keep it up.** You'd better believe this isn't the last we've seen of the Trump Administration's attempts to take health care away from people who need it. **We need a sustained outpouring of grassroots support to convince these folks to change course and start working together to get some real results.**

In just a few days, Team Kaine will face the first FEC filing deadline of 2017, and everyone will be looking to gauge our grassroots support.

**[Will you pitch in to Tim's reelection campaign and keep him in the Senate standing up for what's right?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ax9QXtGdATE85lhz9MjmCfsxKHDVf0No)**

Thanks so much,

Team Kaine

| Peter,
The past few weeks have been an exciting time on the campaign trail as we share Jill's conservative message of less government and more liberty. All across Virginia, Republicans are unifying behind Jill Vogel for lieutenant governor because they see in her a proven conservative who can help our ticket to victory this November.
Just this morning, Christopher Newport University's Watson Center for Public Policy released a [new poll showing Jill Vogel leading the race for the Republican nomination](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xybb5EqnEHfkF0BA90xxOO6f32jhK40B-CmkCSCGyOZZsb-jIbJ2yMjc5yksoZWFOp6TMry0dtHG51_t88sAyz1dcYza70s-pRrm-t-KIla4J1rbnxjDp_PyjBc28uuVsKLH6JsNPqRcwfsmnpkgfxbzPqvWTnOpGtzJvg_Yhhkc2ncckphimKu671qf76OJ56n8tQG3k0iTfMxJf1eiD0LXLGF_tYez30B14UGWEMnfj6AwKFW9fWBH8JNfX0dEgMlofLdsSEanpXnU7BvS8Zg4W58B3haFqRVNlSsoNmLrt1pG_g9gmngbdIlXAA3qbSVXh7txZolB4n6KIkdNLjcU0wI_UeQFBIENIpBY4OQ=&c=3h8XsSQQVx-ZUKxX5NFW6KlxbOGiLPIlbvssPqegP0qLDwuGbMGXeQ==&ch=B6i_Jc3SGv6W-C0mX9h0iqs_CFVnZGjxkPYP6D-FkC-12Yz6p8tW_A==).

Earlier this month, [Jill won the Prince William County GOP's straw poll with 57% of the vote](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xybb5EqnEHfkF0BA90xxOO6f32jhK40B-CmkCSCGyOZZsb-jIbJ2yP8zKdRvGi6IKrHgSQcTFzTJfX7-oK1VPTHwcC779drn4exQNd3VCsvaP3BKAQwH8lUTOXiMhHFnAeGzmmR9shj-rGAxMUJny7F7CgzZXeT9mZKVJkWFfgQAtbEHJFyqItsey6ZD0WaGxdzw6heof-cVFo3CUrsiY1xYFoQr2zl596X0rkxBIbrNzXUs88FfaUSgcpfu-OO9akF_vbabPA9taIqxdk_ZciVM4ceINlgQ&c=3h8XsSQQVx-ZUKxX5NFW6KlxbOGiLPIlbvssPqegP0qLDwuGbMGXeQ==&ch=B6i_Jc3SGv6W-C0mX9h0iqs_CFVnZGjxkPYP6D-FkC-12Yz6p8tW_A==) in a three way race.
Last Monday, [Jill earned the endorsement of VCDL-PAC](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xybb5EqnEHfkF0BA90xxOO6f32jhK40B-CmkCSCGyOZZsb-jIbJ2yMjc5yksoZWFZq7emnN4SIsZkzgsuLmsXJzbrbbWc_Dxy2xFE6-uJgV0eLG_QwBUeWuzeq9YqQ0JSJlVxJKS78MoGljUPIMf8WMYMR7vtKlP7ELGluk7zy1D4F4X9vR353-7d8FpdDgjOCWX6CY6clH_2IXg-dX9MiCNfvcTMsMcGmMyMUcXH3k2_QoaUyEToOfCo-WPbtnG&c=3h8XsSQQVx-ZUKxX5NFW6KlxbOGiLPIlbvssPqegP0qLDwuGbMGXeQ==&ch=B6i_Jc3SGv6W-C0mX9h0iqs_CFVnZGjxkPYP6D-FkC-12Yz6p8tW_A==) for her steadfast record of defending and expanding Virginians' Second Amendment rights.

Last week, our campaign team turned in over 15,000 signatures \- a [field-leading signature total](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xybb5EqnEHfkF0BA90xxOO6f32jhK40B-CmkCSCGyOZZsb-jIbJ2yMjc5yksoZWFNbjLjREtaOPEpTRlHZOJouWkB_zzGtZrtCyZ08_WrQ7l7rcRFk_bxrJek_jQDMJRLrPQDag-1JOahH4krbKS4BShxY5fwbW7Za1cI1tayAj3eEWVXfN06I3Ocwiu8tNdhdZj1LuAUhONw1q6VHxMvw==&c=3h8XsSQQVx-ZUKxX5NFW6KlxbOGiLPIlbvssPqegP0qLDwuGbMGXeQ==&ch=B6i_Jc3SGv6W-C0mX9h0iqs_CFVnZGjxkPYP6D-FkC-12Yz6p8tW_A==) to qualify for June's primary ballot - with tremendous help from more than 400 volunteers.
Finally, this past Saturday, we were thrilled to [win the Fairfax GOP's straw poll by over 45 points, taking 64% of the vote in a three-way race](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xybb5EqnEHfkF0BA90xxOO6f32jhK40B-CmkCSCGyOZZsb-jIbJ2yMjc5yksoZWFHeLw3bWamdHjjZW52beV6Zf-lzzmkpx6l0_b6cCBT23AuN0I8MViPFDS0UPmqwDM3HeC5DXlZfmtT6lZ8WNt2kmTDloUYgYvqwcYhlAyOlbTMnJq_ruDJ9cR6bktU5358YrmhSeJlFZrfsCqgrbb0bypfn6rKA7BLFKh9DlS3trdX49gCCFsEQ==&c=3h8XsSQQVx-ZUKxX5NFW6KlxbOGiLPIlbvssPqegP0qLDwuGbMGXeQ==&ch=B6i_Jc3SGv6W-C0mX9h0iqs_CFVnZGjxkPYP6D-FkC-12Yz6p8tW_A==).

With the momentum building behind Jill, our campaign is ready to win in June and continue the fight for conservative values all the way to victory this November.
Peter, will you join the winning campaign? We need your support.
Please help us get our message out with a [donation of $50, $25, or even $10](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xybb5EqnEHfkF0BA90xxOO6f32jhK40B-CmkCSCGyOZZsb-jIbJ2yMjc5yksoZWFgRN8AhTTNTgBWfKkpdWckW6kA3A5BqEH4b7SgZPxGYDkT1dQeCFygKHovlxjDuIGVoCeAq6RZhm_k0IWNewcbkNl7j2qkKzz9IKGEpVckwgo19jydH1K4r-T9wXcg_DwWG9p0-KJdpsUoFRjzKLAFl3KvS67-zEhsos_NGDwLCLGXvQiuf1OBA==&c=3h8XsSQQVx-ZUKxX5NFW6KlxbOGiLPIlbvssPqegP0qLDwuGbMGXeQ==&ch=B6i_Jc3SGv6W-C0mX9h0iqs_CFVnZGjxkPYP6D-FkC-12Yz6p8tW_A==) before our critical quarterly finance deadline on March 31st.

name: URGENT ALERT (via DSCC)
subject: The GOP voted to sell your browsing history (without permission)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Republicans want to roll back more than just Obamacare: GOP Senators voted party line to kill Obama-era rules that keep your information from being sold without consent.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2d1/2b07114c/5931adb3/736b6f48/2261034275/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-internet-privacy1?source=PT-20170328-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend --

While everyone was focused on the health care vote, Senate Republicans passed one of their sneakiest pieces of legislation yet:

**_They voted to let internet companies sell your internet history and browsing information -- without your permission._**

One of our top targets in 2018, Senator Jeff Flake, was behind this creepy effort -- and he led every single GOP Senator to pass this bill -- while every Senate Democrat voted against it.

**[Will you fight back with Senate Democrats who voted against this gross invasion of privacy? Add your name to stand with us before the bill moves to the House side TODAY.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2d1/2b07114c/5931adb3/736b6f48/2261034275/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-internet-privacy1?source=PT-20170328-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Corporations are overjoyed to get rid of restrictions so they can use your location, web browsing history, and even information about your family and health to reap enormous revenue.

And Senate Republicans are so determined to keep this power grab in place that they used a backdoor maneuver to stop the FCC from **_ever_** reinstating internet privacy rules again, no matter what party controls Congress or the White House.

So if Trump signs this law into effect, there's no way to regain control over how our information is traded over the internet.

**[Don't let Republicans get away with this, friend. Add your name to tell Congress NO on rolling back President Obama's internet privacy rules.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2d1/2b07114c/5931adb3/736b6f48/2261034275/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-internet-privacy1?source=PT-20170328-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thanks for taking a stand,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on contributions, friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

**[Contribute](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170328-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: UPDATE: Gain a biblical perspective on today’s big debates!
body:
Finding a proper perspective on the big debates
View this email in your browser

My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE
A Conversation with J.D. Greear
Date: MAR 30TH
Time: 8:30PM (ET) / 5:30PM (PT)

Dear Peter,

How you look at the world
matters. It affects what you believe and what you do. But how do
we gain the proper perspective, not so we can win an argument in
the debates of our time, but so we can faithfully display the
glory of God in the world around us?

Join us with author and pastor
J.D. Greear for our next My Faith Matters LIVE show as we explore
how to gain a biblical perspective on today's big debates.

J.D. Greear is the pastor of The
Summit Church, in Raleigh-Durham, NC and author of Gaining by
Losing: Why the Future Belongs to Churches That Send (2015) and
Stop Asking Jesus into Your Heart: How to Know for Sure You Are
Saved (2013). J.D. describes the joy, reckless generosity, and
audacious faith that come from having a right worldview and
knowing God's extravagant love found in Christ.

Be encouraged and join the
conversation on Thursday, March 30th at 8:30PM ET / 5:30PM PT.

My Faith Matters LIVE shows are
streamed live over the Internet at MyFaithVotes.org, or if you
are on the move, sign up for our interactive call and listen on
your phone.

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Making our votes meaningless?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
body:
Regardless of his qualifications and experience, Neil Gorsuch is an illegitimate nominee to the U.S. Supreme Court. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46d5/1c469400/2e560d4/35484be/3931982626/VEsH/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170328_r4w_gorsuch3_optin&source=20170328_r4w_gorsuch3_optin") Friend, Barack Obama won the 2012 presidential election by approximately 5 million votes. Donald Trump _lost_ the 2016 election by approximately 3 million. **So when Republicans block President Obama 's nominee to the Supreme Court for nearly a year in order to install their own pick under Trump, they completely undermine the meaning and weight of the votes all those Americans cast.** And undermining the meaning of our votes undermines not just the legitimacy of President Trump's nominee to the Supreme Court -- but the very legitimacy of our democratic system itself. [_**Stand for the legitimacy of our Supreme Court and our democracy. Sign the LegitAction petition opposing President Trump 's Supreme Court nominee today.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46d5/1c469400/2e560d4/35484bf/3931982626/VEsE/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Stand+for+the+legitimacy+of+our+Supreme+&utm_campaign=20170328_r4w_gorsuch3_optin&source=20170328_r4w_gorsuch3_optin") Real signs are emerging that Republicans won't be able to move past a filibuster (or eliminate the filibuster itself) if Democrats and Independents draw a line in the sand here. We need to show Democratic and Independent senators that we'll have their backs if they stand for us. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, Russ Feingold | [TAKE ACTION»](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46d5/1c469400/2e560d4/35484bc/3931982626/VEsF/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+TAKE+ACTIONraquo&utm_campaign=20170328_r4w_gorsuch3_optin&source=20170328_r4w_gorsuch3_optin")

name: Democrats.org
subject: You know how important this deadline is
body:
Let's sprint through the finish line.
---
**Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is on Friday, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $3 or more right now.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e7068fc/332056689/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")**
This Friday is our first quarterly deadline of 2017, **[so we're asking folks like you to pitch in $3 or whatever you can right now.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e7068fd/332056689/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+so+were+asking+folks+like+you+to+pitch+i&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")** Here's where your support goes:
1. Building the infrastructure we'll need to take back the White House after Donald Trump's single term
2. Hiring and training organizers all across the country who are working tirelessly to flip seats in the House and in the Senate during midterms next year
3. Helping candidates in local and state races tell their stories and talk to as many voters as possible
4. Making it easier at every level for every single eligible voter to cast their ballot

Your support truly does go a long way in electing Democrats up and down the ballot. We've got some really big things to do in the next few months, and when you pitch in $3 or whatever you can, you're helping to make sure we have the resources we need to pull out a few wins.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e7068fa/332056689/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e7068fb/332056689/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e7068f8/332056689/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e7068f9/332056689/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e706886/332056689/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e706887/332056689/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd")
** Thanks for all your help.

Lindsey

Lindsey Reynolds
Chief Operating Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e706884/332056689/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e706885/332056689/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e706882/332056689/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca23/4067b0a/2e429cd62/7e706883/332056689/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170328_lr_nd&source=em_20170328_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170328_lr_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
